_README: The shared connection-type vocabulary — the stud sizes. Two organ ports connect iff their `type` matches. Curated deliberately: a new type is added only when no existing one fits (sprawl defeats the standard). Each type pins the shape that flows on that wire. See CONNECTORS.md. VENDORED copy: this is a vendored snapshot of orchestrator@feat/drift-gate/types.json so the self-hosted CI runner can validate ports.json against it without cross-repo auth. Types flagged `_proposed` are NOT yet in the canonical vocabulary — they are proposed for review in the PR that introduces them; sync this file when canonical types.json moves.

TenantContext.desc: A resolved tenant: identity, branding, provenance bag.

SiteCrawl.desc: Signals crawled from a prospect's website at signup.

InterviewTranscript.desc: Ordered Q&A pairs from a discovery interview.

KeyFacts.desc: Themed facts extracted from a transcript (the discovery memory).

EntityGraph.desc: Deduplicated canonical entities (people, systems, tools) per tenant.

Blueprint.desc: The system blueprint: modules + integrations + current/recommended state.

ProcessFlow.desc: Sequence / swimlane of a workflow extracted from transcript themes.

AccountState.desc: A fleet account's pacing/quota state (the pace + drift gates' input).

ClaimVerdict.desc: Whether a worker may claim work now, and why (gate output).

BillingState.desc: A tenant's subscription / billing state + feature entitlements.

ConformanceVerdict.desc: Whether an organ/output conforms + groundedness (self_metric shape).

ProvenancedArtefact.desc: Any spec/feature the scan-and-select takes from the OLD apparatus, wrapped with its origin + succession status so the new machine knows it as inherited, never native. Retain history, know it as such — succession baked in, the antidote to old-artefacts-polluting-new. See FRESH_APPARATUS.md.

ExpertDomainCatalogue.desc: PROPOSED (pending review) — The set of expert-feedback domains a tenant has configured, plus optional per-domain display metadata. This is the catalogue an expert's requested domain is resolved against. Today the producing organ reads its `domains` from the top-level `available_domains` state key and its `configs` from `domain_configs`; a type-wiring composer would carry the bundled catalogue object on this wire.

DomainResolution.desc: PROPOSED (pending review) — A theme-pack domain-resolution decision: which configured domain (if any) an expert's request resolved to, or a generic-prompt fallback, and why.
